title: Su From So
subTitle: In the coastal village of Marlur, Ashoka's innocent crush sparks rumours of ghostly possession, creating comedic chaos and unexpected twists.

title: Penguin
subTitle: Rhythm, a pregnant woman, is traumatised by nightmares about the unsolved kidnapping of her first child, Ajay. Later, she embarks on a harrowing mission to solve the mystery of his disappearance.

title: Chakram
subTitle: Chandrahasan, a truck driver, falls in love with Indrani and gets married to her. His life takes an unexpected turn when his best friend kidnaps Indrani and he sets out to rescue her.

title: Oru Kaatil Oru Paykappal
subTitle: When Sara's homestay receives Ajith as a guest, he falls for her. However, unbeknownst to him, Sara's father arranges for her to marry a rich man.

title: Udayananu Tharam
subTitle: A struggling director gets cheated by his friend who steals his script and becomes a famous actor. However, when he finally gets the chance to direct a film, he is forced to cast a dubious actor.

title: Kadha Parayumbol
subTitle: Balan, a barber, struggles to give his family a better living. However, his life changes when his old friend, who is a film star, comes to his village for a film shoot.

title: Lucky Baskhar
subTitle: Desperate to bring his family out of monetary woes, Baskhar Kumar, a bank employee, enters the dangerous and murky world of financial scams.

title: Bangalore Days
subTitle: Three cousins, Divya, Krishnan and Arjuna, share a close bond and decide to move to Bangalore to fulfil their childhood dreams. There, they face challenges that will change their lives forever.

title: Premalu
subTitle: Having been rejected once, Sachin, a young man, falls for Reenu, a girl he meets during a wedding and sets out to win her over.

title: Nadodimannan
subTitle: Padmanabhan, a man who joins political rallies to make money, gets into trouble when he is elected mayor of Thiruvananthapuram and is forced to fight corruption in the city.

title: Nadodimannan
subTitle: Padmanabhan, a man who joins political rallies to make money, gets into trouble when he is elected mayor of Thiruvananthapuram and is forced to fight corruption in the city.

title: 9: Nine
subTitle: A scientist embarks on an astronomical research journey to the Himalayas with his son and colleagues. However, when he brings a young woman into their lives, unexpected things unfold.

title: Aanum Pennum
subTitle: An anthology of stories set in different timelines in history that explores female strength as the protagonists tackle the crises brought on by their male counterparts.

title: YSR Yatra
subTitle: A renowned Indian politician embarks on a 900-mile walking tour and interacts with his followers as part of his election campaign.

title: Neelakasham Pachakadal Chuvanna Bhoomi
subTitle: Kasi and Suni decide to go on a road trip from Kerala to Nagaland in search of Kasi's girlfriend. On their way, they experience several life-defining moments.

title: Karyasthan
subTitle: After a past incident, two powerful clans of Krishnapuram remain estranged until one day, a man with a mysterious past decides to bring the families together.

title: Two Countries
subTitle: Ullas schemes to marry Simran, woman with a disability, to avoid repaying a debt, but faces complications when Laya, a wealthy alcoholic, enters his life, turning his plans upside down.

title: Thuruppugulan
subTitle: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: Bahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: Ittymaani: Made in China
subTitle: Ittymaani, who was raised in China, runs a business of counterfeit products in India. However, when he tries to help Annamma who is ignored by her sons, he lands in trouble because she falls ill.

title: Ittymaani: Made in China
subTitle: Ittymaani, who was raised in China, runs a business of counterfeit products in India. However, when he tries to help Annamma who is ignored by her sons, he lands in trouble because she falls ill.

title: Janatha Garage
subTitle: When Anand visits Hyderabad, he encounters Sathyam, who operates an organisation aiding the underprivileged. Sathyam, swayed by Anand's vision, hands over the organisation's management to him.

title: Kili Poyi
subTitle: Friends Chacko and Hari are fed up with their employer and plan a trip to Goa. Their trip turns into something unusual when they discover a mysterious bag.

title: Sakhavu
subTitle: Kichu is a heartless student leader who can go to any extent for power. He is asked to donate his blood to save a man named Krishnan, whose story changes him for the better.

title: Sunday Holiday
subTitle: Unni, who wishes to become a scriptwriter, learns that a director is hospitalised in his locality. He meets him to narrate his story about Amal, a heartbroken man who plans to start life afresh.

title: Snehaveedu
subTitle: Ajayan comes back to his village to be with his ailing mother. However, things get strange when a boy comes to his house claiming to be his son.

title: Thondimuthalum Driksakshiyum
subTitle: Newly-weds Sreeja and Prasad struggle to cope with their lives and decide to sell Sreeja's gold chain for money. However, a thief steals the chain during a bus journey, adding to their woes.

title: Srungaravelan
subTitle: Kanan falls in love with Raddhu, the daughter of a ruthless city gangster responsible for numerous deaths. To marry her, Kanan must confront the dangers and challenges that lie ahead.

title: Oru Marubhoomikkadha
subTitle: Madhavan is an honest and hardworking man. However, when a rich man's daughter, Eliana, asks him to abduct her and demand a ransom from her father, his life turns upside down.

title: Niram
subTitle: Aby realises that he is in love with Sona, his childhood friend, but is unable to express his feelings. However, he faces a dilemma when he learns that her marriage has already been arranged.
